claimText: The RECLAIM framework for mine closure stands for Reach out, Envision, Co-design, Localise, Act, Integrate, and Maintain.
evidenceExcerpt: RECLAIM Framework for Mine Closure: REACH OUT, ENVISION, CO DESIGN, LOCALISE, ACT, INTEGRATE, MAINTAIN.
examUse: Statement-based question on the components or purpose of the RECLAIM framework.
distractorHooks: Swapping words in the acronym such as Rehabilitate instead of Reach out
Associating the framework with a different sector like plastic waste management

claimText: L.I.V.E.S. is a practitioner's guide that serves as a benchmark for responsible and sustainable mine closures.
evidenceExcerpt: L.I.V.E.S is a comprehensive practitioner’s guide to serve as benchmark for responsible and sustainable mine closures.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching L.I.V.E.S. to its purpose as a mine closure guide.
distractorHooks: Associating L.I.V.E.S. with healthcare or wildlife conservation
Claiming it is a framework for active mining operations rather than closure

claimText: ARTHA is a Green Financing Framework designed to channel investments towards transforming reclaimed mines into productive and environmentally friendly assets.
evidenceExcerpt: ARTHA is a Green Financing Framework for channeling investments towards transforming reclaimed mines into productive and environmentally friendly assets.
examUse: Statement-based or correct-pair question on the purpose of the ARTHA framework.
distractorHooks: Associating ARTHA with general rural microfinance or agricultural subsidies
Claiming it funds initial mine exploration instead of post-closure green financing
